ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "eu_size" REAL /* EU shoe size */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "mm_size" INTEGER /* Size in millimeters */,
  "inch_size" REAL /* Size in inches */,
  "india_size" REAL /* India shoe size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the shoe */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the shoe */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category (e.g., Sneakers, Boots) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the shoe */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level for the shoe */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the shoe is designed (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the shoe */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the shoe (e.g., Leather, Canvas) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size from the size_conversion table */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Details of previous purchases made by the customer */,
  "preferred_gender" TEXT /* Preferred gender of shoes */,
  "preferred_color" TEXT /* Preferred color of shoes */,
  "preferred_material" TEXT /* Preferred material of shoes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer returning the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the returned product */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "return_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "return_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments provided by the customer during the return process */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size from the size_conversion table */,
  "available_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available for this size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for this product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* Description of the last action performed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "fit_rating" REAL /* Rating for the fit of the shoe (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comfort_rating" REAL /* Rating for the comfort of the shoe (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size from the size_conversion table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being promoted */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Amount) */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to qualify for the promotion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to make the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
